chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Misc. Application No.1030 of 2024 Ghulam Qasim vs. The SHO of Police Station Gulistan-e-Jouhar & other) 21.01.2025. Mr. Mehmood Ahmed Khan, advocate for applicant Mr. Faheem Hussain, APG Proposed accused 3 are present in person O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant filed an applicant u/s 22-A Cr.PC for registration of an FIR against proposed accused, who are present, alleging that they had kidnaped his son Hamza on 22.08.2024 and demanded extortion of Rs.25,00,000/-. 2. On the other hand, proposed accused Zeeshan has submitted that Hamza was friend of his and he had invested an amount of Rs.26,50,000/- in his business, which he failed to account for and gave to him cheques, which on presentation have been dishonoured, hence, in order to preempt any criminal action against him his father has filed this application. 3. Learned APG has also supported the impugned order. 4. I have considered submissions of the parties. There is no illegality in the impugned order and prima facie no offence of cognizable nature has been made out and the application has been rightly dismissed. This being the position, this application in hand is meritless and is accordingly dismissed along with pending application(s). J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
